description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Lusha is a B2B sales intelligence platform offering verified contact and company data. The platform exposes four REST APIs (Enrichment, Prospecting, Signals, Lookalike) plus webhook subscriptions and an account usage endpoint. Authentication is via an api_key header generated in the Lusha dashboard.

Contact Support:
 Name: Lusha
